overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit metropolis. The player moves from an indoor food counter through corridors with digital billboards, onto rain-slicked streets with towering advertisements, under an overpass with a vibrant food stall, and finally up stairs to an elevated walkway.

agents.ego_description: standing at a food counter observing the vendor and customer

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the counter gesturing with one hand
customer with spiky blonde hair sitting at the counter

entered.detail: metallic counter with yellow stripe and cooking equipment
blue illuminated screen displaying menu items above the counter
yellow poster with food advertisement on the wall behind the vendor

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a futuristic food establishment, facing a service counter where a vendor stands behind metallic cooking equipment. A customer with distinctive spiky hair sits at the counter to the right, while digital menu screens and promotional posters adorn the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor commercial corridor with digital advertising

events.description: exits food counter area and enters long neon-lit corridor with reflective floors
approaches glass exit doors leading to outdoor urban street

agents.ego_description: walking through a futuristic corridor with highly reflective floors and cyan neon ceiling lights

entered.detail: long cyan neon light strips running the length of the corridor ceiling
large illuminated advertisement for MIXO UP beverage with purple branding
tall bamboo plants in white rectangular planters along the corridor sides
transparent glass walls separating the corridor from adjacent interior spaces

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the food counter into a sleek, modern corridor illuminated by cyan neon strips overhead. The floor is highly polished and reflective, with large digital billboards advertising beverages at the far end. Potted bamboo plants line the walkway, and glass walls reveal adjacent spaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet urban street with neon signage and elevated highways

events.description: exits building onto wet city street reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
turns left to follow the sidewalk along the building facade

agents.ego_description: walking along a rain-slicked sidewalk in a dense cyberpunk cityscape with towering neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: person in dark coat walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: rain-soaked road surface reflecting the colorful neon lights from buildings
massive concrete overpass structure with yellow safety trim spanning the street
large blue billboard with red star logo reading CIRRUS COLA
tall skyscrapers covered in bright neon advertisements and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the building, the scene opens onto a wet urban street at night. The pavement reflects the glow of massive neon billboards and building facades. An elevated highway overpass looms ahead, while the player passes a pedestrian in dark clothing walking the opposite way.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular food stall under overpass with purple neon lighting

events.description: enters covered plaza area beneath the overpass featuring a brightly lit circular food stall
circles around the circular food stall counter to view different angles

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling a vibrant purple-lit food stall with several customers seated around it

notable_agents.action: multiple customers sitting on stools around the circular counter eating and drinking

entered.detail: circular counter with bright purple neon underlighting and FRESH & INSTANT signage overhead
massive cylindrical concrete columns supporting the highway overpass above
purple illuminated vending machines with various advertisements on the sides

segments.scene_description: The player enters a sheltered plaza beneath the overpass, dominated by a circular food stall glowing with vibrant purple neon. Several customers sit on stools around the counter. Massive concrete support pillars rise around the space, and vending machines line the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass corridor leading to stairway and upper pedestrian level

events.description: leaves the food stall area and enters darker corridor toward the stairway
begins ascending wide concrete stairs to upper level
reaches top of stairs with panoramic view of the neon-lit city street below

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit corridor, climbing stairs, and emerging onto an upper level walkway overlooking the city

notable_agents.action: woman in white jacket and shorts walking up the stairs ahead of the player

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward to upper level
elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings providing overlook of the street below

segments.scene_description: Leaving the food stall behind, the player moves through a darker corridor toward a stairway. Following a woman in a white jacket, the player ascends the stairs and emerges onto an upper level walkway with glass railings, revealing a sweeping view of the neon-lit cityscape and wet streets below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the intimate interior of a futuristic eatery out into the expansive, neon-drenched scale of a rainy metropolis. It begins at a metallic service counter surrounded by digital menus and patrons before gliding into a sleek, polished corridor defined by cyan neon strips and reflective floors. As the camera emerges from the building, the environment opens onto a wet urban street where massive billboards cast vibrant glows across the rain-slicked pavement. The path then leads beneath a heavy concrete overpass into a sheltered plaza dominated by a purple-lit circular food stall, before shifting toward a darker corridor. Finally, the camera follows a woman in a white jacket up a flight of stairs, ascending to an elevated walkway with glass railings that reveals a sweeping vista of the glowing cityscape below.
